name: Controls mapped to architecture requirements (linkage exists; partial coverage allowed in V1)
summary: Implementer expresses the link between abstract control and concrete software capability via ArchitectureRequirement.forControl, or an equivalent machine-readable edge. Partial coverage is acceptable in V1; full coverage is a higher-level concern.
requirements: For every control the implementer claims architectural backing for, at least one ArchitectureRequirement (or equivalent record) exists with forControl pointing at that control.
Every ArchitectureRequirement.forControl resolves to a known control id.
The framework's underlying clauses and controls still satisfy Level 1 and Level 2 invariants.
manual_checks: Reviewer confirms ArchitectureRequirement.forControl edges resolve via packages/ontology/conformance/validate.mjs.
Reviewer confirms at least one architecture requirement exists for each control the implementer claims architectural backing for.
